entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation-SingelAccount/Group Creation-Rule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ResourceObject PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ResourceObject displayName="ESHIAM\Aiden markram" identity="CN=Aiden
